title: Create: Beyond Ages
description: Reimagines Create by adding story and lore, as well as advanced mechanics, powered by new alloys.
body:
![Create beyond ages 0.4.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/721da8390aaf61943cd3b8264b00a6e80a262046.png)

# Bronze & Crembronze! **This mod introduces Bronze and Crembronze, two alloys that expand technological progression beyond standard Create components. Bronze serves as the foundation for new machines, mechanical parts, and early upgrades, while Crembronze, refined from Bronze, unlocks more advanced tools, enhanced mechanisms, and powerful late-progression technology.** ![Poster Crembronze 0.4.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fd6d3d22efe20cd34f9f957ecb981588d9ade10.png) ![Poster Bronze 0.4.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1c4e9fa82d00f218ce29370b2741dd32d217d17.png) **Bronze Progression** — Introduces Bronze and its components, forming a new technological step with dedicated materials, crafting parts, and mechanical upgrades. **Crembronze Technology** — Advanced alloy refined from Bronze, unlocking enhanced machines, tools, and late-progression Create integrations. **New Frogports Variants** — Adds new types of Frogports designed to expand logistics and conveyor connectivity options. **And much more!** # **Check out our OST!** # **Companion Package!** ![Package Poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33065431abf9820b750c8c588db98dccab40f89.png) ## **Dialogue System & Lore!** **The mod features a _dynamic dialogue_ system that reacts to the player’s actions, making interactions feel more responsive and the world more alive.** ![Create beyond ages dialogue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f839f8882f5a71b7792996b7f83c055371f9339b.gif) ![Poster Devil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e18ada927db20f2e74c2893a3cae40240899e3b.png) ![Dungeon Foto](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f8676b7fa0c8277634cd515ca9cf820fbf4659b_0.webp) ## **Languages!** **The mod is fully localized and available in the following languages:** 1. English 2. Polish 3. German 4. Russian 5. Ukrainian ## **Alpha Stage** **The mod is currently in _alpha_, so bugs may occur. You able to report issues and provide feedback via Discord.** ## **Special shoutout:** ## **Testers** ### ScherErik ### Roher
